summary: P0 Premium Login UX & Logout Features - ALL TESTS PASSED. P0-A: AuthLaunchOverlay renders immediately on Google sign-in/sign-up click (before 150ms redirect), AuthCallback shows branded loading and error screens with 'Visionary Suite' branding, no 'Emergent' text visible on any app-controlled auth screen. P0-B: Dashboard user menu toggle works with dropdown showing Profile, Billing, Sign out options. Profile page has logout button in header. Logout clears localStorage and redirects to /login. Protected route /app redirects to /login when not authenticated. Mobile viewport (390x844) shows user menu and bottom nav with Profile tab.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthLaunchOverlay.js: Correctly implements branded overlay with 'Visionary Suite' logo, rotating loading messages, and slow network notice after 8s
Login.js lines 249-267: handleGoogleSignIn sets googleLoading=true immediately, renders AuthLaunchOverlay, 150ms delay before redirect to auth.emergentagent.com
Signup.js lines 300-316: Same pattern as Login - googleLoading state triggers AuthLaunchOverlay before redirect
AuthCallback.js lines 170-231: Branded loading state with 'Visionary Suite' logo, rotating bootstrap messages, spinner
AuthCallback.js lines 119-168: Branded error state with 'Sign-in didn't complete' message, Try Again and Back to Login buttons
Dashboard.js lines 744-810: User menu with toggle (data-testid='user-menu-toggle'), dropdown (data-testid='user-menu-dropdown') containing Profile, Billing, Sign out options
Dashboard.js lines 791-798: handleLogout clears localStorage (token, user, user_id, auth_return_path, remix_return_url) and does window.location.href='/login'
Profile.js lines 266-282: Logout button in header (data-testid='profile-logout-btn') with same logout logic as Dashboard
App.js lines 157-168: ProtectedRoute wrapper checks localStorage token and redirects to /login if not authenticated
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Premium Login UX and Logout features verified in iteration 396. Key findings: 1) AuthLaunchOverlay component renders immediately when googleLoading=true, before the 150ms redirect to auth.emergentagent.com; 2) AuthCallback shows branded loading screen (data-testid='auth-callback-loading') with 'Visionary Suite' branding and rotating messages; 3) AuthCallback shows branded error screen (data-testid='auth-error-screen') when no session found; 4) No 'Emergent' text visible on any app-controlled auth screen; 5) Dashboard has user menu toggle (data-testid='user-menu-toggle') visible for logged-in users; 6) User menu dropdown (data-testid='user-menu-dropdown') shows Profile, Billing, Sign out options; 7) Sign out button (data-testid='menu-logout') clears localStorage and redirects to /login; 8) Profile page has logout button (data-testid='profile-logout-btn') in header; 9) Protected route /app redirects to /login when not authenticated; 10) Mobile viewport (390x844) shows user menu and bottom nav with Profile tab.

P0-A_login_google_overlay.details: AuthLaunchOverlay (data-testid='auth-launch-overlay') renders immediately after Google sign-in click on Login page

P0-A_signup_google_overlay.details: AuthLaunchOverlay (data-testid='auth-launch-overlay') renders immediately after Google sign-up click on Signup page

P0-A_google_button_disabled.details: Google button shows loading state (Loader2 spinner + 'Signing in...' text) after click, disabled via googleLoading state

P0-A_auth_callback_loading.details: AuthCallback shows branded loading screen (data-testid='auth-callback-loading') with 'Visionary Suite' logo and rotating messages

P0-A_auth_callback_error.details: AuthCallback shows branded error screen (data-testid='auth-error-screen') with 'Sign-in didn't complete' message when no session found

P0-A_no_emergent_text.details: No 'Emergent' text visible on Login, Signup, AuthCallback loading, or AuthCallback error screens

P0-B_dashboard_user_menu_toggle.details: User menu toggle (data-testid='user-menu-toggle') visible for logged-in users on Dashboard

P0-B_user_menu_dropdown.details: User menu dropdown (data-testid='user-menu-dropdown') shows Profile, Billing, Sign out options

P0-B_menu_logout_button.details: Sign out button (data-testid='menu-logout') visible and functional in dropdown

P0-B_profile_logout_button.details: Profile page has logout button (data-testid='profile-logout-btn') in header

P0-B_logout_clears_token.details: Clicking Sign out clears auth token from localStorage and redirects to /login

P0-B_protected_route_enforcement.details: After logout, accessing /app redirects to /login (protected route enforcement)

P0-B_mobile_user_menu.details: Dashboard user menu works on mobile viewport (390x844)

P0-B_mobile_bottom_nav_profile.details: Mobile bottom nav shows Profile tab (data-testid='nav-profile') for navigation
